About Store Newsletter Episodes

Field Notes: Lanterns, Tides, and Quiet Weather

Show Notes

A made-up harbor survey compares brass lantern colors with tide marks on a painted pier.

The hosts sort observations into a pocket ledger before the afternoon rain arrives.

Transcript

The transcript imagines a bell buoy answering a lantern from the far seawall.

It then records three cloud shapes and a blue boat leaving the inlet.
